ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "firstname" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "lastname" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the player is based */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the team */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the current coach */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website URL of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who sustained the injury */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the injury was recorded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the injury details */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, moderate, severe) */,
  "recovery_time" INTEGER /* Estimated recovery time in days */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., sprain, fracture, concussion) */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment or rehabilitation plan */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Expected date of return to play */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disciplinary_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disciplinary action */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player receiving the action */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of the action (e.g., fine, suspension) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Monetary amount associated with the action (if applicable) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the disciplinary action */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the suspension in games or days */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the action (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disciplinary_actions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the contract */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "value" REAL /* Total monetary value of the contract */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., rookie, veteran, extension) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the contract (e.g., active, expired, pending) */,
  "option_year" INTEGER /* Indicates if the contract includes an option year */,
  "agent" TEXT /* Name of the player's agent or representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, manager, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device and browser used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
